boss_checklist.boss.armageddon_mod_arion: Arion, Tyrant of the Emerald Wrath
boss_checklist.summon.adventurez_blackst: Build an altar in the Nether according to the wiki or mod page.
boss_checklist.summon.adventurez_the_eye: Build an altar in The End according to the wiki or mod page.
boss_checklist.summon.adventurez_void_sh: Defeat The Eye, in its place there will be a portal to the Void, where the boss will be. (requires VoidZ mod)
boss_checklist.summon.alexscaves_luxtruc: Throw the §1Ominous Catalyst§r§0 onto an active Volcanic Core.
boss_checklist.summon.alexsmobs_void_wor: Throw the §1Mysterious Worm§r§0 into the void of the End.
boss_checklist.summon.aquamirae_captain_: Can be summoned using the §1Shell Horn§r§0 near the water in the Ice Maze.
boss_checklist.summon.aquamirae_eel: Find him at the bottom of the Underground Shelter in the Ice Maze.
boss_checklist.summon.armageddon_mod_bri: Craft and use §1The Key Of Doom§r§0.
boss_checklist.summon.armageddon_mod_zor: Craft and use §1Fiery Wither Skull§r§0 in the Nether.
boss_checklist.summon.ars_nouveau_wilden: Perform the Ritual of Wilden Tribute.
boss_checklist.summon.arthropocolypse_be: Find the boss arena in the desert.
boss_checklist.summon.block_factorys_bos: Find the tall tower in the Overworld with the boss at the top.
Look for suspicious ruins with bones in the desert.
Find the boss arena in the Nether and open the door with the §1Underworld Arena key§r§0, which can be obtained from the trial spawmers.
Encounter a bone-strewn icy peak in a snowy plain.
boss_checklist.summon.blue_skies_alchemi: Buy 4 §1Dazzling Dungeon Keys§r§0 from the Gatekeeper and enter the boss room at the top of Everdawn's Blinding Dungeon.
boss_checklist.summon.blue_skies_arachna: Find 4 §1Poison Dungeon Keys§r§0 in the Poison Dungeon and enter the boss room on its lower level.
boss_checklist.summon.blue_skies_starlit: Find 4 §1Nature Dungeon Keys§r§0 in the Nature Dungeon and enter the boss room at the top.
boss_checklist.summon.blue_skies_summone: Buy 4 §1Dazzling Dungeon Keys§r§0 from the Gatekeeper and enter the boss room at the top of Everbright's Blinding Dungeon.
boss_checklist.summon.born_in_chaos_v1_l: Right-click on the Infernal Evil Pumpkin using Transmuting Elixir.
boss_checklist.summon.bosses_of_mass_des: Find the large arena in the Nether lava pools and destroy the §1Ancient Carved Blackstone§r§0 in its center.
Find the Lich's Tower using a Soul Star, a low chance drop from undead. Summoning the boss requires §14 Soul Stars§r§0.
Insert §1Eye of Ender§r§0 into the Obsidian Altar atop the giant floating structure in the End.
Find him deep in the caves by planting a Void lily that will point in the direction of the boss.
boss_checklist.summon.call_of_yucutan_ah: Break the Ah Puch Idol in the Death Crypt.
boss_checklist.summon.call_of_yucutan_ku: Break the Kukulkan Idol in the Overgrown Temple.
boss_checklist.summon.callfromthedepth__: Use the Agony Key on the Sacrificial Stone in the Sacrificial Bastion.
Use the Abyss Key on the Darkstone in the Depths Temple.
Use the Sorrow Key on the Sorrow Stone in the Marble Forge.
boss_checklist.summon.cataclysm_ancient_: Find the sleeping boss in the Cursed Pyramid using the Eye of Desert and use the §1Necklace of the desert§r§0 obtained from suspicious sand.
boss_checklist.summon.cataclysm_ender_gu: Follow the Eye of Void to the Shattered Citadel in the End.
boss_checklist.summon.cataclysm_ignis: Find the Burnung Arena with the Eye of Flame, defeat the Flame Revenants, and right-click the Fire Altar with the §1Burning Ash§r§0.
boss_checklist.summon.cataclysm_maledict: Click the Cursed Tombstone behind the Door of Seal, opened with the §1Strange Key§r§0, in the Frosted Prison, which the Eye of Curse will show you the way to.
boss_checklist.summon.cataclysm_netherit: Follow the Eye of Monstrous to the Soul blacksmith in the Nether.
boss_checklist.summon.cataclysm_scylla: Click the anchor at the top of the Acropolis, which can be found with the Eye of Storm in the Overworld.
boss_checklist.summon.cataclysm_the_harb: Find the Ancient factory using the Eye of Mech and use the §1Nether Star§r§0 to awaken the boss.
boss_checklist.summon.cataclysm_the_levi: Place the §1Abyssal Offering§r§0 at the Deep Altar in the Sunken City, which the Eye of Abyss will show you the way to.
boss_checklist.summon.companions_sacred_: Find him in the center of the Monkey Temple in the jungle and right-click on him.
boss_checklist.summon.conjurer_illager_c: Find him in the Theatre in the Dark Forest.
boss_checklist.summon.darkdoppelganger_d: Throw the §1Shadow Orb§r§0 into the abyss in The End.
boss_checklist.summon.deep_aether_eots_c: Located in the Brass Dungeon high in the sky of Aether.
boss_checklist.summon.deeperdarker_stalk: In the Otherside dimension, in the Ancient Temple, there are Ancient Vases that, when destroyed, have a 0.5% chance of spawning a boss.
boss_checklist.summon.dungeonnowloading_: Use the §1Skull of Chaos§r§0 to awaken the sealed boss in the deep dungeon.
Use the Redstone Idol in the center of the deep jungle dungeon. (Summoned along with Fairkeeper Ouros)
Use the Redstone Idol in the center of the deep jungle dungeon. (Summoned along with Fairkeeper Boros)
boss_checklist.summon.eeeabsmobs_corpse_: Find him at the Blood Altar using the §1Eye of Bloody Altar§r§0 in the Nether.
boss_checklist.summon.eeeabsmobs_nameles: Find the underground structure using the §1Eye of Guling§r§0 and descend to its very bottom, passing several tests.
boss_checklist.summon.fdbosses_chesed: Find the boss arena using the §1Eye Of Chesed§r§0.
boss_checklist.summon.fdbosses_geburah: Find the boss arena int the End using the §1Eye Of Geburah§r§0.
boss_checklist.summon.fdbosses_malkuth: Find the boss arena using the §1Eye Of Malkuth§r§0.
boss_checklist.summon.friendsandfoes_wil: Find a large structure in the Nether called the Citadel, with a miniboss in the center.
boss_checklist.summon.frostiful_frostolo: Find him on the third floor of the castle, the map to which can be found in Chillager Outposts in cold biomes.
boss_checklist.summon.galosphere_berserk: Find him in the deep shrine in the Pink Salt Caves.
boss_checklist.summon.goety_brood_mother: Destroy §1Spider Mother Den§r§0 in the large room of the Spider Den.
boss_checklist.summon.goety_crone: Click on the §1Crystal Ball§r§0 in the Blighted Shack, which can be found in the swamp.
boss_checklist.summon.goety_ender_keeper: Find the Final Terminal in the End using the §1Voided Eye§r§0; use the §1Void Keys§r§0 to open the Void Frames and insert the resulting §1Void Shards§r§0 into the Void Shrine in the center of the structure.
boss_checklist.summon.goety_endersent: Find the Final Terminal in the End using the §1Voided Eye§r§0; use the §1Void Key§r§0 to open the Void Frame.
boss_checklist.summon.goety_hostile_reds: Enable "hostileRedstoneGolemRaid" at goety-mobs.toml. Appears on raid waves 5 and 6.
Enable "hostileRedstoneMonstrosityRaid" at goety-mobs.toml. Spawns on final wave on hard difficulty and Bad Omen V raid.
boss_checklist.summon.goety_minister: Has a 15% chance to spawn in a Pillager Patrol if the player has a lot of Soul Energy; or on final wave on hard difficulty and Bad Omen V raid.
boss_checklist.summon.goety_skull_lord: Open the locked §1Pithos§r§0 in the crypt, the path to which is shown to you by §1Cryptic Eye§r§0.
boss_checklist.summon.goety_vizier: Use the §1Dark Scroll§r§0 in a forest mansion or similar structure in the dark forest.
boss_checklist.summon.goety_wight: Sometimes appears near players who have 9000 or more Soul Energy.
boss_checklist.summon.goety_wither_necro: Use the §1Blazing Horn§r§0 in Nether Fortress.
boss_checklist.summon.graveyard_lich: The text does not fit here, the link to it is in the bookmark below.
boss_checklist.summon.hs_bosses_sand_war: Find a tall tower in the desert and use the §1Totem of Undying§r§0 on the sealed block at its top.
boss_checklist.summon.illagerinvasion_in: Find him in the Mansion in a dark forest.
boss_checklist.summon.irons_spellbooks_d: Find it in the Catacombs, where the §1Wayward Compass§r§0 points.
boss_checklist.summon.irons_spellbooks_f: Use the §1Cinderous Soulcaller§r§0 in the Citadel found via the §1Ancient Map§r§0 in the Nether.
boss_checklist.summon.knightquest_nether: Fill the Great Chalice completely with essences, then feed §1Radiant Essence§r§0 on it.
boss_checklist.summon.legendary_monsters: Find it with §1Eye of Many Ribs§r§0.
Find the Cloudy Temple using §1Eye of Air§r§0.
Find it with §1Eye of Chorus§r§0 in The End.
Find it with §1Eye of Magma§r§0 in the Nether.
Find it with §1Eye of Shulker§r§0 in The End.
Find it with §1Eye of Bones§r§0 in the Nether.
Find it with §1Eye of Soul§r§0 in the Nether.
boss_checklist.summon.lost_aether_conten: Click on the Songstone at the top of the Platinum Dungeon.
boss_checklist.summon.minecells_concierg: Complete all Mine Cells challenges and fight the boss in the Black Bridge dimension.
boss_checklist.summon.minecells_conjunct: Get the Vine Rune in the Promenade of The Condemned, then return to the Prison and find a place to use the Rune. (I couldn't replicate this in-game, so I copied it from the wiki.)
boss_checklist.summon.minecraft_elder_gu: Appears in the Ocean Monument on the third floor and in both of its wings.
boss_checklist.summon.minecraft_ender_dr: Located on the central island of The End. Can be re-summoned using 4 End Crystals placed on each side of the return portal.
boss_checklist.summon.minecraft_wither: Crafted with §14 Soul Sand§r§0 and §13 Wither Skulls§r§0.
boss_checklist.summon.mofus_better_end__: Find the large room with the altar in the Endermite Mound and use 5 Blood Jug on it and the blocks below it, then place the Endermite Queen Idol on it.
Find the Clock Tower, use 4 FosEnd Energy Cubes on the altars around it, kill the minibosses and awaken boss with Mechanical Fosend Eye.
Find Forgotten Town in the Broken Constellation dimension.
Stand in the center on top of the structure that appears after defeating Forgotten Litch.
boss_checklist.summon.monsterexpansion_r: Sometimes appears on the End islands.
boss_checklist.summon.monsterexpansion_s: Sometimes appears on the surface of the overworld.
boss_checklist.summon.mowziesmobs_ferrou: Find him in the Wrought Chamber underground.
boss_checklist.summon.mowziesmobs_frostm: Spawns in snowy biomes such as Snowy Plains or Ice Peaks.
boss_checklist.summon.mowziesmobs_sculpt: Appears in the center of the Monastery.
boss_checklist.summon.mutantmonsters_mut: Sometimes appears on the surface of the overworld.
Sometimes appears on the End islands.
Sometimes appears on the surface of the overworld.
Sometimes appears on the surface of the overworld.
boss_checklist.summon.mutantmore_mutant_: Find The Derelict Laboratory in the forest, brew a potion §1Formula Y§r§0 or §1Compound Z§r§0 and use it on a blaze.
Find The Derelict Laboratory in the forest, brew a potion §1Formula Y§r§0 or §1Compound Z§r§0 and use it on a zombie in cold biome.
Find The Derelict Laboratory in the forest, brew a potion §1Formula Y§r§0 or §1Compound Z§r§0 and use it on a hoglin.
Find The Derelict Laboratory in the forest, brew a potion §1Formula Y§r§0 or §1Compound Z§r§0 and use it on a husk.
Find The Derelict Laboratory in the forest, brew a potion §1Formula Y§r§0 or §1Compound Z§r§0 and use it on a zombie in the jungle.
Find The Derelict Laboratory in the forest, brew a potion §1Formula Y§r§0 or §1Compound Z§r§0 and use it on a shulker.
Find The Derelict Laboratory in the forest, brew a potion §1Formula Y§r§0 or §1Compound Z§r§0 and use it on a wither skeleton.
boss_checklist.summon.mythsandlegends_bl: Find an altar in a graveyard in a desert or badlands and use the §1Soulbinder Amulet§r§0 on it at night.
boss_checklist.summon.rediscovered_red_d: Find the brick pyramid in the Skylands dimension and destroy all the Dragon Pylon's inside, then climb to the top.
boss_checklist.summon.remnant_bosses_oss: Build a special altar and place the §1Nether Star§r§0 on it.
boss_checklist.summon.sleepy_hollows_hor: Use §1Luminous Essence§r§0 on the pedestal in the center of the Cemetery.
boss_checklist.summon.soulsweapons_accur: Find the Decaying Kingdom in the Nether.
boss_checklist.summon.soulsweapons_chaos: Use the Shard of Uncertainty (dropped by the Wither) on the Blackstone Pedestal.
boss_checklist.summon.soulsweapons_day_s: Use Chaos Orb during the day.
boss_checklist.summon.soulsweapons_draug: Spawning in the Old Champion's Graves.
boss_checklist.summon.soulsweapons_moonk: Use the Essence of Eventide on the Old Moon Altar.
boss_checklist.summon.soulsweapons_night: Use Chaos Orb during the night.
Аppears after killing The Old Champion's Remains.
boss_checklist.summon.soulsweapons_retur: Use the Lost Soul on the Old Moon Altar.
boss_checklist.summon.terra_entity_eater: Use §1Worm Food§r§0 or destroy §13 Shadow Orbs§r§0.
boss_checklist.summon.terra_entity_queen: Use §1Abeemiantion§r§0 or destroy the §1Larva§r§0 in the hive.
boss_checklist.summon.terra_entity_skele: Talk to the Old Man at night or kill the Tailor with his voodoo doll in the accessory slot.
boss_checklist.summon.terramity_gob: Use a Red Gnome Hat at the Golden Gnome Statue in the Court of Gnomes.
boss_checklist.summon.terramity_gundalf: Use an Occult Fabric on an offering pedestal found in the middle of Chthonic Cathedrals on the Nether Roof.
boss_checklist.summon.terramity_super_sn: Appears when Sniffer is struck by lightning.
boss_checklist.summon.terramity_trial_gu: Insert a Spire Key at the lock at the basement of the Trial Tower.
boss_checklist.summon.terramity_ultra_sn: Cause a lightning strike to hit a Super Sniffer at Phase 2 while it is weakened at less than 10% of its HP.
boss_checklist.summon.terramity_virtue: Throw an Unholy Lance into the sky in the Overworld.
boss_checklist.summon.traveloptics_the_n: Use §1Excrucis§r§0 on the sleeping boss in the Void Cathedral.
boss_checklist.summon.twilightforest_alp: Lives in the Yeti's Lair in the Snowy Forest.
boss_checklist.summon.twilightforest_hyd: Lives in the Hydra's Lair in the Fire Swamp.
boss_checklist.summon.twilightforest_kni: Find them on the lower level of the Goblin Knight Stronghold in the Dark Forest.
boss_checklist.summon.twilightforest_lic: Can be found at the top of the Lich's Tower in the Forest.
boss_checklist.summon.twilightforest_min: It is located at the bottom of the Labyrinth in the Swamp.
boss_checklist.summon.twilightforest_nag: Lives in the Naga's Courtyard, which can be found in the Forest.
boss_checklist.summon.twilightforest_sno: Located on top of the Aurora Palace in the Glacier.
boss_checklist.summon.twilightforest_ur_: Can be found at the top of the Dark Tower in the Dark Forest.
boss_checklist.summon.twilightforest_yet: Lives in the Yeti's Lair in the Snowy Forest.
boss_checklist.summon.unusualend_endston: Place §1Dragon's Breath§r§0 on the Golem Altar at the top of the tower in The End.
boss_checklist.summon.wetlands_elder_gea: Find a dungeon in the swamps; assemble the golem form by turning the copper valve; animate the Broken Copper Gear with the Bottled §1Will-o'-the-Wisp§r§0 and place the pumpkin that's in the chest.
boss_checklist.summon.witherstormmod_wit: Complete the wither form in the ruined structure in the center of the world.
Appears at the end phase 5 of the Wither Storm.
boss_checklist.summon.wraithon_wraithon: Use Showdown Edict to enter the boss dimension.
command.boss_checklist.boss_marked_succe: Boss "%s" is marked as "%s" in the world.
Boss "%s" is marked as not yet defeated in this world.
Boss "%s" is marked as defeated in this world.
fml.menu.mods.info.description.boss_chec: Adds a convenient list of all bosses from your modpack.
gui.boss_checklist.boss_version: Version from which the boss was added:
gui.boss_checklist.defeated: Boss has been defeated in world.
gui.boss_checklist.info_adventurez_void_: The VoidZ mod is required for the portal to appear.
gui.boss_checklist.info_armageddon_mod_t: These are three bosses that appear one after another.
gui.boss_checklist.info_dungeonnowloadin: The drop depends on which boss you killed last.
The drop depends on which boss you killed last.
gui.boss_checklist.info_fdbosses_chesed: It is recommended to study a more detailed description in the arena.
gui.boss_checklist.info_fdbosses_geburah: It is recommended to study a more detailed description in the arena.
gui.boss_checklist.info_fdbosses_malkuth: It is recommended to study a more detailed description in the arena.
gui.boss_checklist.info_goety_apostle: Some drops only occur when summoned in the Nether.
gui.boss_checklist.info_hs_bosses_sand_w: Perhaps the §3Totem of Undying§f can be found in this same tower..?
gui.boss_checklist.info_mowziesmobs_fros: The music disc only drops if the boss is killed during a snowfall and you take the Ice Crystal from his hands.
gui.boss_checklist.info_mowziesmobs_scul: To obtain the Gauntlet, you must pass his test.
gui.boss_checklist.info_terra_entity_bra: The drop is specified for Expert mode.
gui.boss_checklist.info_terra_entity_eat: The drop is specified for Expert mode.
gui.boss_checklist.info_terra_entity_eye: The drop is indicated for Expert mode and both evils.
gui.boss_checklist.info_terra_entity_kin: The drop is specified for Expert mode.
gui.boss_checklist.info_terra_entity_que: The drop is specified for Expert mode.
gui.boss_checklist.info_terra_entity_ske: The drop is specified for Expert mode.
gui.boss_checklist.info_terramity_gundal: It has three phases in the form of three different bosses.
gui.boss_checklist.info_twilightforest_k: There will be six of them, and you need to defeat each one.
gui.boss_checklist.miniboss_defeated: Miniboss has been defeated in world.
gui.boss_checklist.miniboss_not_defeated: Miniboss not yet defeated in world.
gui.boss_checklist.no_bosses_loaded: There are no bosses! The resources may be broken or empty.
gui.boss_checklist.not_defeated: Boss not yet defeated in world.
gui.boss_checklist.server_warning: Make sure the mod is also installed on the server, otherwise this checkbox will not change.
gui.boss_checklist.settings.button_enabl: There will be a button in the pause menu that opens the checklist.
gui.boss_checklist.settings.enable_async: Server logic will be execute asynchronously.
gui.boss_checklist.settings.enable_stati: Remember the time of the last battle and the top players by damage?
gui.boss_checklist.settings.progression_: Hides all information about an undefeated boss except for the spawn info.
An addition to the previous one, hiding the spawn info and mod.
gui.boss_checklist.settings.save_boss_ki: Preserve the name of the one who dealt the final blow?
gui.boss_checklist.settings.search_bar_e: There will be a search at the top, with which you can search by name and ID.
gui.boss_checklist.wiki_link_info: Click to go to the wiki.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.boss_chec: Adds a convenient list of all bosses from your modpack.
